description:
Showcase your gaming or tech products with this neon Cyber Monday email. Design the template to fit your business’s needs. Plug your social media handles, product descriptions and a specific bold Call to Action that will increase sales and engagement on feature products. 

All Beefree templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
